name: ArachnoMod (Spider Animation)
description: A giant, procedurally-animated spider that stalks players. One roams the world at a time, respawning every 5-30 minutes. It hunts the nearest player within 64 blocks - towering over the trees and charging in at incredible speed the further away you are, then shrinking down as it closes in for a 6-heart bite. Built on FABRIK inverse-kinematics legs drawn with vanilla BlockDisplay entities. Created by iR3DN4X. Based on TheCymaera/minecraft-spider.
license: Source-available custom license (free to play; no commercial reuse, no ports, no rehosting) - see LICENSE.md in this jar. Derivative of TheCymaera/minecraft-spider by Heledron, used with attribution.
